system.notes:
High-speed suborbital spaceplane designed for combat and interception (Delta/Cruiser); armed with chemical lasers, space-to-space and ASAT missiles, and kinetic-kill mines.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.30): Delta · 80 · 1-2 · 0 · Chemical · 7 · Batteries, Fuel Cell · 55% · 2 · 2m3 · 2 · 8 · 1 · 5 · 2 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 80 million eb; Crew 1-2; Passengers 0; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 7; Power Type Batteries, Fuel Cell; Sensors 55%; Computers 2; Cargo 2m3; Actions 2; Weapon Spaces 8; Armor (max SP) 1; Damage Points 5; Overkill Points 2; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
